# Pegasus Status And Readiness Contract

## Scope And Authority

This manually loaded reference owns generic status selection and readiness claims. It does not define phase-specific gates or result fields.

Use `blocked` when an unmet gate prevents safe continuation, `in_progress` only when authorized work actually began and remains unfinished, and `completed` only when the assigned phase boundary and required updates/checks are complete. Do not use readiness wording as a substitute for approval or verification.

State blockers, residual risks, and the exact next action. Preliminary checks may support handoff readiness but never establish final verification or acceptance.
